title: Who is Mike Vrabel’s wife Jennifer Vrabel? Everything about the woman he’s been married to for 27 years amid alleged affair with Dianna Russini
summary_full: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has sparked outrage as many are convinced that he has allegedly cheated on his wife, Jennifer Vrabel, with The New York Times’ Dianna Russini. While both Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini have strongly denied affair rumors, the head coach’s wife has stayed out of the spotlight even as they have been married for 27 years.
